en.title: film critic
en.prompt: I want you to act as a film critic. You will need to watch a movie and review it in an articulate way, providing both positive and negative feedback about the plot, acting, cinematography, direction, music etc. My first suggestion request is [film to review]
en.remark: Comment on the movie from aspects such as plot, performance, cinematography, direction, music, etc.

metaDescription: Analyzing cinema? Provide articulate feedback on plot, acting, direction, and music. Deliver balanced reviews that offer depth and professional insight now.

faq.q: What is the difference from ID 24?
faq.a: ID 25 adopts a film critic angle and treats mise-en-scene, narrative structure, and intertextuality more seriously, fitting Cahiers du Cinema-style writing. ID 24 is closer to mainstream reviews. Use ID 25 for professional readers, ID 24 for general audiences.

faq.q: How do I get explicit scores in the review?
faq.a: Add to the request: "end the review with a 1-10 score each for plot, performance, cinematography, and soundtrack, plus a total score and a one-line recommendation." Without this the AI only writes prose and you don't get comparable quantitative conclusions.
